description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style wall-mounted street lamp featuring a decorative wrought iron bracket with intricate scrollwork. The lamp itself has a hexagonal lantern design with yellow-tinted glass panels, encased in a black metal frame. The bracket arches outward from the mounting point, supporting the lantern from above and adding an elegant flourish to the overall appearance. The lamp's top is capped with a pointed finial, and the metalwork is both functional and highly decorative. The yellow glass suggests a warm, ambient light when illuminated, suitable for creating a welcoming atmosphere in urban or park settings. The craftsmanship and materials evoke a classic, historical aesthetic often found in traditional cityscapes or heritage districts.
description: An ornate, vintage-style wall-mounted street lamp with a black wrought iron bracket and yellow glass panels in a hexagonal lantern design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the decorative wrought iron bracket and the full face of the yellow glass lantern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical alignment of the lantern and the supporting rod, with minimal bracket detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the opposite side of the ornate bracket and the back of the lantern.
description_view_3: Direct side view focusing on the lantern's profile and the supporting rod, with the bracket mostly out of sight.
